privileged_info_summary: Task uses real synthetic sales data containing 1000 records with 4 product categories, 2 customer types, and 3 payment methods. Data columns include Sale_Date, Sales_Rep, Region, Sales_Amount ($100-$10k range, avg $5,019), Quantity_Sold, Product_Category (Clothing/Electronics/Food/Furniture), Discount, Customer_Type (New/Returning), and Payment_Method. Required deliverables are a Power BI report with two pages (Pipeline Summary and Category Drillthrough), containing funnel, stacked bar, table, and card visuals, plus DAX measures for Avg_Order_Value and Total_Transactions. Critical issue: Task setup scripts (setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1) referenced in hooks do not exist, making the task incomplete and unexecutable.
